text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Not bad at all. Guess I can pull through when I
put my mind to it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But boy oh boy, I almost had it... I was so close to
getting that win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess my plan wasn't up to snuff...
choice_data_list: Let's really blow their socks off in the next one!
Let's really blow their socks off in the next one!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess my plan wasn't up to snuff...
choice_data_list: Let's really blow their socks off in the next one!
Let's really blow their socks off in the next one!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, how should we shock 'em next time around?
We've gotta come up with an even wilder plan.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm thinking I'd like to even pull the wool over your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I see Seiun Sky brimming with confidence, I
can't help but feel she's going to get the win next
time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Geez, Trainer. Cool it with the optimism already.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Saying that means I'll have to think up something
better.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Clearly I'm still lacking the right shock factor...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seiun Sky mumbles quietly to herself.
